rationale: Simplified _report_publication_metadata with declared-key comprehensions and guarded declared_outputs access in the MM-504 follow-up commit.
Top-level review summary only; no separate actionable request beyond the inline comment already addressed.
Removed the duplicate dockerMode alias so workflowDockerMode remains the single canonical mode field across launcher metadata, tests, and MM-504 spec artifacts.
Top-level Codex review wrapper only; the actionable inline feedback was handled separately.
Added watchfiles to pyproject.toml and regenerated poetry.lock so the Docker build consumes it from locked requirements instead of a manual pip install.
Removed pytest-related installs from runtime-base so production api-runtime and worker-runtime images no longer inherit test runners; test-runtime still installs requirements-tests.txt.
Replaced the editable Docker image install with a standard pip install --no-deps . after copying the source tree into /app.
This review body only summarized the three inline Gemini comments above, which were addressed individually.
Restored the frontend:ci and contracts:check gates on the amd64 publish path before docker/build-push-action runs.
